rationale: Bug hunt C27: OghamSelector (329 lines) was created but never wired into Hub→Run flow. Bible s.2.2 mandates ogham selection before each run. Also BroceliandeForest3D hardcoded Beith instead of reading from store. Both are flow-critical bugs that break the core loop: player can never choose their rune.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C28: verify OghamSelector opens correctly after BiomeRadial, confirm ogham_actif persists to 3D scene. Feature candidates: word minigame skeleton (core loop gap), talent tree skeleton (meta progression), or biome-specific 3D walkConfigs.
